hero.title: The AI-Powered Platform for
hero.subtitle: Automate patient communication across WhatsApp, web chat, and SMS. Reduce no-shows, fill schedules, and grow your practice with AI that works 24/7.

features.title: Everything Your Clinic Needs
features.subtitle: A complete AI platform to automate patient engagement, streamline operations, and grow revenue.

whatsappAI.title: WhatsApp AI
whatsappAI.description: Bidirectional AI conversations for booking, reminders, and patient support on WhatsApp.

webChat.title: Web Chat Widget
webChat.description: Embeddable AI chat widget for your website. Patients book appointments directly from your site.

smsCampaigns.title: SMS Campaigns
smsCampaigns.description: Outbound SMS templates and bulk messaging for reminders, follow-ups, and marketing.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: AI-powered booking with natural language, public booking links, and waitlist auto-fill.

patients.title: Patient Management
patients.description: Centralized records, AI memory of preferences and history, and a self-service patient portal.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location
multiLocation.description: Manage multiple branches, departments, and providers from a single dashboard.

campaigns.title: Outbound Campaigns
campaigns.description: Multi-channel campaigns via SMS and WhatsApp with audience targeting and tracking.

careGap.title: Care Gap Outreach
careGap.description: Predictive outreach for preventive care. Automatically identify and contact patients due for checkups.

reminders.title: Automated Reminders
reminders.description: Multi-channel reminders via SMS and WhatsApp to reduce no-shows by up to 50%.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Appointment trends, patient growth, revenue estimates, and CSV exports for all data.

agentBuilder.title: Agent Builder
agentBuilder.description: No-code visual flow editor. Customize AI behaviors, greetings, and escalation rules.

triageRouting.title: AI Triage & Routing
triageRouting.description: Automated symptom triage with severity classification and smart routing to the right provider.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Go from setup to live in under 30 minutes.

step1.title: Set Up Your Clinic
step1.description: Add your providers, services, locations, and working hours.

step2.title: Configure Your AI
step2.description: Customize greetings, booking rules, and responses with the no-code Agent Builder.

step3.title: Connect Your Channels
step3.description: Link WhatsApp, embed the chat widget on your website, and configure SMS.

step4.title: Go Live & Grow
step4.description: Start accepting bookings, launch campaigns, and track everything from your dashboard.

benefits.title: Why Healthcare Providers Choose Tawafud
benefits.subtitle: Built for clinics and hospitals across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf. One platform to automate every patient touchpoint.

list.slots: Fill schedules with smart waitlist & auto-fill
list.channels: Reach patients on WhatsApp, web chat, and SMS
list.revenue: Grow revenue with outbound campaigns and offers

demo.title: Try the AI Assistant
demo.subtitle: Interact with our AI assistant and see how it handles patient conversations

finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
finalCta.subtitle: Join clinics across Saudi Arabia already using Tawafud. Start your free trial today.
